attributes.action: End Stealth Tax raise the Personal Allowance & threshold in line with inflation.
attributes.additional_details: It prevents "fiscal drag" from eating into your take-home pay every time you get a cost-of-living raise. A petition for this targets the "hidden" tax rises that hit workers harder than those on fixed benefits.
attributes.background: The government needs raise the Personal Allowance (currently £12,570) and the Higher Rate threshold (£50,270) in line with inflation (CPI)

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749467
